title: Keystroke Dynamics
html: Stub. Behavioral biometric — each person types in a characteristic rhythm. Not unique enough to identify but discriminative enough to verify. Can be captured passively while the person types something else. Sub-mode of biometric recognition. First mentioned in 2025 04 27 biometrics iris keystroke palmprint survey.

related.label: Biometrics survey — iris, keystroke, palmprint, retina, signature, voice
